# myhealth checkup

> The UK's trusted comparison platform for private blood tests, health screenings, and cancer screening from UKAS-accredited and CQC-regulated providers.

myhealth checkup helps health-conscious adults compare private diagnostic tests across leading UK providers. Pricing, biomarkers, turnaround times, and accreditations are surfaced transparently so users can make informed decisions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Compare private blood tests and health screenings from accredited UK providers.
- [Compare Tests](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of blood tests across providers.
- [Test Categories](/test-categories): Browse tests by health category.
- [Compare by Symptom](/compare/symptoms): Find tests based on your symptoms.
- [Compare by Goal](/compare/goals): Find tests aligned to your health goals.
- [Assisted Test Finder](/assisted-test-finder): Guided quiz to recommend the right test.
- [Find a Clinic](/find-clinic): Locate accredited clinics near you.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): How the comparison platform works.
- [How We Rank](/how-we-rank): Our ranking methodology.
- [Trusted Providers](/trusted-providers): Our accredited provider partners.
- [Health Resource Hub](/blog): Articles on biomarkers, conditions, and preventative health.
- [Blood Test Analysis](/blood-test-analysis): AI-assisted result interpretation tool.
- [About Us](/about): Our mission and story.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions.
